old\":\"5e-4\",\"op\":\"replace_exact\",\"source\":\"\",\"text\":\"\"},{\"anchor\":\"\",\"function\":\"build_scheduler\",\"new\":\"\",\"old\":\"\",\"op\":\"replace_function\",\"source\":\"def build_scheduler(optimizer: optim.Optimizer, steps_per_epoch: int):\\n    if not USE_LR_SCHEDULE:\\n        return None\\n    total_steps = TRAIN_MAX_STEPS if TRAIN_MAX_STEPS is not None else max(steps_per_epoch * 4, 1)\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(optimizer, T_max=max(total_steps, 1))\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"summaries\",\"rationale\":\"Use the fixed checker budget more effectively by decaying the learning rate across the actual training horizon instead of an implicit 100-epoch schedule.
